name: Seeed XIAO ESP32-S3
notes: Seeed XIAO ESP32-S3: 21 x 17.5 mm, ESP32-S3 (dual-core Xtensa LX7, 8 MB flash, 8 MB PSRAM). 11 GPIOs broken out as D0-D10, 7 pads per side.
The D0-D10 to GPIO map is specific to this model - a XIAO ESP32-C3 or C6 uses different GPIOs behind the same silkscreen.
GPIO3 (D2) is a strapping pin. The 'Sense' camera add-on uses extra GPIOs not broken out here; native USB is on GPIO19/20 (not on the header).
